full_text:
Liu Shao (Kongcai) 劉劭 (孔才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Shao (劉劭), styledKongcai (孔才), was born in Zhao. Sent by Cao Rui to save Jiangxia from Wu. Compiled a considerable number of works. Liu Shao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
